engine.backend: RPC client plus four SYCL Level Zero rpc-server workers

commandSnippet: GGML_DISABLE_FUSED_RMS_NORM=1 GGML_DISABLE_FUSED_MUL_UNARY=1 llama-bench -m MiniMax-M2.7-UD-IQ4_XS-00001-of-00004.gguf -rpc 127.0.0.1:50100|0,127.0.0.1:50101|0,127.0.0.1:50102|0,127.0.0.1:50103|0 -p 0 -n 64 -r 3 -ngl 99 -sm layer -ts 1/1/1/1 -fa 0 -nkvo 1 -ub 32 -ctk f16 -ctv f16 --threads 4 -w 0 -mmp 1 -rtr 1 -fmoe 1 -no-mmad 0 -muge 1 -sas 0 -o json
notes: Corrected post device-map-fix layer split uses -ts 1/1/1/1, fused MoE, merged up/gate experts, fused MMAD, F16 KV, and -nkvo 1. No speculative decoding, no expert dropping, no power-limit changes. The first POST returned HTTP 400 because the API now requires an additional metric alongside tokSOut; resubmission with tokSTotal equal to tokSOut was accepted.
